title: NE2215_11.F.77 is available
description:
New Version Available: NE2215_11.F.77_2770_202411011916

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

System

•  Adds the feature of setting the default alarm sound in "Clock" for all alarms in a unified manner.

• Adds a module to Trinity Engine to optimize apps after system updates, speeding up app launches and reducing power consumption.

• Integrates the November 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
